variables.description: Set to 'true' to allow new users to register, or 'false' to disable registration.
variables.label: Signups Allowed

variables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the web-based vault interface.
variables.label: Web access port enabled

variables.description: The external TCP port for the Vaultwarden web interface.
variables.label: Vaultwarden Web UI Port

variables.description: Secure hashed token for the admin panel. Generate one via `docker exec -it vaultwarden ./vaultwarden hash`. For maximum security, leave this blank in your .env file to disable the admin panel entirely.
variables.label: Admin Token
